title: Bloody Sanguimancy
description: A project created to the tune of lololoshka seasons with its own mechanics and implementation. Attention! The textures are taken from the lololoshka seasons.
body:
Use the power of blood to achieve great goals and become a true blood lord. With it, you can fly, defeat monsters and improve your stats by applying various effects.

**The textures and concept were borrowed from the Lololoshka seasons.**

Author: Komti23

To work with the mod, also download:

[https://modrinth.com/mod/curios](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) 

[https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

[https://modrinth.com/mod/photon-editor/versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/photon-editor/versions)

[https://modrinth.com/mod/ldlib](https://modrinth.com/mod/ldlib)

To work with the particles, download:

[https://drive.google.com/file/d/1urvcXeELPxRVnAyT7y6vH2EH9EBbR7Cn/view]

[https://disk.yandex.ru/d/oDYotMacX3KdYA](https://disk.yandex.ru/d/oDYotMacX3KdYA)

And transfer it to the Minecraft folder.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------
Применяйте силу крови, чтобы достичь великих целей и стать истинным повелителем крови. С её помощью вы сможете летать, побеждать монстров и улучшать свои характеристики, применяя различные эффекты.

**Текстуры и концепция были позаимствованы из сезонов «Лололошки».**

Автор: Komti23

Для работы мода также скачайте:

[https://modrinth.com/mod/curios](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) 

[https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

[https://modrinth.com/mod/photon-editor/versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/photon-editor/versions)

[https://modrinth.com/mod/ldlib](https://modrinth.com/mod/ldlib)

Для работы частиц скачайте:

[https://drive.google.com/file/d/1urvcXeELPxRVnAyT7y6vH2EH9EBbR7Cn/view]

[https://disk.yandex.ru/d/oDYotMacX3KdYA](https://disk.yandex.ru/d/oDYotMacX3KdYA)

И перекиньте в папку Майнкрафта
